BASE.name: ATTACK_VECTOR
BASE.justification: The issue can be exploited remotely because eval-like javascript functions are used.

BASE.name: ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
BASE.justification: No special conditions are required to exploit this issue.

BASE.name: PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
BASE.justification: The attacker doesn’t require privileges to trigger implied eval.

BASE.name: USER_INTERACTION
BASE.justification: The attack usually requires the user to trigger the vulnerable function (e.g., clicking something).

BASE.name: SCOPE
BASE.justification: The impact is limited to the same application scope.

BASE.name: INTEGRITY
BASE.justification: Data or logic may be modified.

BASE.name: AVAILABILITY
BASE.justification: Unlikely to crash or deny access—mostly script execution.

TEMPORAL.name: EXPLOIT_CODE_MATURITY
TEMPORAL.justification: The issue is well known and demonstrable.

TEMPORAL.name: REPORT_CONFIDENCE
TEMPORAL.justification: The issue is clearly identified by static analysis.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: The attacker doesn’t require privileges to trigger implied eval.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_USER_INTERACTION
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: The attack usually requires the user to trigger the vulnerable function

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_AVAILABILITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Unlikely to crash or deny access—mostly script execution.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: INTEGRITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Code integrity is a major concern.
